properties.comments: Production deployment stage progression for API service v2.1. This stage implements blue-green deployment with canary analysis for safe production rollouts. The deployment will proceed through 25% traffic split initially, with automatic health monitoring and rollback capabilities.

workTrackingItem.description: Production deployment work item for API service v2.1 release. Includes deployment checklist, rollback procedures, and post-deployment verification steps.

approvalRequest.description: Production deployment approval request with stakeholder sign-offs from security, operations, and product teams.

supportIncident.description: Related support incident tracking production readiness verification and deployment coordination with support team.

accessElevationRequest.description: Privileged access elevation request for production deployment permissions with time-limited scope.

relatedChangeState.description: Related staging deployment change state that must complete successfully before production deployment.

testResults.description: Production validation test results including load testing, security scanning, and integration testing outcomes.

serviceCatalog.description: Service catalog entry for API service containing deployment procedures, dependencies, and operational runbooks.
